query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.claim_id,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.structural_damage_severity,
  a.confidence_score,
  (CASE WHEN a.repair_intelligence_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_repair_intel,
  (CASE WHEN a.physics_analysis IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_physics,
  (CASE WHEN a.cost_intelligence_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_cost_intel,
  (CASE WHEN a.damaged_components_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_components,
  (CASE WHEN a.fraud_score_breakdown_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_fraud_breakdown,
  a.created_at
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.repair_intelligence_json IS NOT NULL
   OR a.physics_analysis IS NOT NULL
   OR a.cost_intelligence_json IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

  (CASE WHEN a.fraud_score_breakdown_json IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS has_fraud_breakdown,
  a.created_at
FROM ai_assessments a

   OR a.physics_analysis IS NOT NULL
   OR a.cost_intelligence_json IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
